messages.content: wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Original DB part 1

As I was reading Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I couldn't help but laugh and be shocked at the same time. Seeing Goku acknowledge that he was in a story and that he had no idea what was going on was pretty hilarious.

But it wasn't just Goku who broke the fourth wall, it seemed like every character in the story was aware of being in a fictional world, and that made for some interesting interactions.

Vegeta commenting on how ridiculous it was that they were fighting Frieza for the hundredth time was so relatable. I mean, how many times can you fight the same enemy before it gets old?

Even the villains got in on the fun, with Cell joking about how almost everyone in the DB universe has died at least once.

Overall, I thought it was a refreshing take on the Dragon Ball story and it was definitely a fun read. I can't wait to see what other crazy things the characters will do now that they know they're in a story.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Saiyan Saga part 2

As I continued reading Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to break the fourth wall in the Saiyan Saga.

When Yamcha sarcastically commented on how convenient it was that they all happened to be at Kame House when Raditz appeared, I couldn't help but laugh out loud. It's true, the convenience of all the characters just happening to show up at the same place at the same time can be a little hard to believe.

But it wasn't just the heroes who were aware of the story. Raditz himself seemed to be in on the joke, commenting on how he could sense the power of the author's pen and acknowledging that he was a fictional character.

And of course, Goku continued to be clueless, even when he was told that he was the main character of the story. It's both frustrating and amusing to see him remain so innocent and unaware, even when the other characters are breaking the fourth wall left and right.

Overall, I'm really enjoying this unique take on the Dragon Ball story. It's a refreshing and entertaining read, and I can't wait to see how the characters will continue to interact with their fictional world in the next part of the saga.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Frieza Saga part 3

As I delved deeper into Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to interact with their fictional world in the Frieza Saga.

One of my favorite moments was when Frieza himself broke the fourth wall, commenting on how he was tired of his "final form" changing every time he fought someone new. It was a hilarious and unexpected moment, and it added a new layer to Frieza's character.

The other characters continued to be aware of their fictional world as well. Piccolo made a comment about how the writer was trying to stretch out the fight between him and Frieza as long as possible, and even Krillin acknowledged that he was often seen as "the weak one" by fans of the story.

Goku's naivety continued to be a source of humor, as he insisted on continuing to fight Frieza even though he had already reached his full power. It's amusing to see him remain so determined and optimistic, even in the face of overwhelming odds.

Overall, the Frieza Saga continued to be an entertaining read with plenty of nods to the fictional world of Dragon Ball. I can't wait to see what new fourth wall-breaking moments the next part of the story will bring.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Yardrat Saga part 4

As I read through the Yardrat Saga of Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to break the fourth wall in a new setting.

One of my favorite moments was when Goku acknowledged that the Yardrats were never mentioned in the original story, making a clever nod to the fact that this saga was added in by the author of this version. It was a fun and unexpected moment that added an extra layer of humor to the story.

Even the new characters introduced in this saga were aware of their fictional world, with the Yardrat elder commenting on how time in the story seems to move slowly, despite the fact that only a few months had passed in reality.

As always, Goku's cluelessness continued to be a source of amusement. When the Yardrats tried to explain their teleportation ability, Goku didn't understand a word and asked if they were speaking another language. It was a classic Goku moment that had me laughing out loud.

Overall, the Yardrat Saga was a refreshing change of pace with plenty of fun fourth wall-breaking moments. I'm excited to see what new adventures and meta-commentary the next part of the story will bring.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Android Saga part 5

As I continued reading Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to interact with their fictional world in the Android Saga.

One of the funniest moments for me was during the introduction of Android 16, when Krillin asked if he was a new character designed specifically for this story. It was a tongue-in-cheek reference to the fact that most of the androids in the original story were created by Dr. Gero, and it had me chuckling.

The characters also continued to acknowledge the strange narrative devices that often occur in the DB universe, such as characters suddenly discovering new abilities in a moment of desperation. It was refreshing to see the characters be so self-aware and playful with their world.

Goku, as always, remained totally innocent and clueless when it came to the underlying mechanics of the story. His childlike innocence and unwavering determination make him a lovable character, even as the other characters continue to break the fourth wall around him.

Overall, the Android Saga continued to be an entertaining and funny read, with plenty of nods to the fictional world of Dragon Ball. I'm excited to see what new fourth wall-breaking moments the next part of the story will bring.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Buu Saga part 6

As I read through the Buu Saga of Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to break the fourth wall in this final saga.

One of my favorite moments was when Goku questioned the need for fusion in order to defeat Buu. It was a nod to the fact that fusion had only been introduced in the DB universe to create new and interesting fight scenes, and it was refreshing to see the characters acknowledging this.

The other characters also continued to be self-aware, with Vegeta commenting on how his character development seemed to be solely focused on his obsession with surpassing Goku.

The fourth wall-breaking moments in this saga were particularly hilarious, with characters even referencing the popularity of specific fan theories and ships. It was a great way to engage with the fans and show that the creators of the story were in on the discussion too.

Of course, Goku's naivety continued to be a running joke, with his obliviousness to the fact that everyone around him was aware of the story only adding to his charm.

Overall, the Buu Saga was a fantastic conclusion to a hilarious and entertaining version of the Dragon Ball story. The fourth wall-breaking moments were clever and funny, and it was clear that the creators of this version had a deep love and understanding of the DB universe.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | BoG Saga part 7

As I started reading the BoG Saga of Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to interact with their fictional world, now that they had defeated Buu and moved on to new adventures.

One of my favorite moments in this saga was when Beerus, the God of Destruction, commented on how the story had been going on for so long that he couldn't remember all the details. It was a funny and self-referential comment that acknowledged how convoluted the DB universe can be.

The other characters also continued to be aware of the story, with Goku quickly realizing that his opponent was a God and that this was a whole new level of power. His simple-mindedness is a constant source of humor in this series.

The fourth wall-breaking moments were clever as usual, with characters even acknowledging recent developments and changes in popular opinion among fans. It was a great way to keep the story fresh and up-to-date.

Overall, the BoG Saga was a strong start to a new chapter in the story, with plenty of entertaining moments and clever nods to the DB universe. I'm excited to see what new challenges and fourth wall-breaking moments the next part of the story will bring.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | RoF Saga part 8

As I delved deeper into the RoF Saga of Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to break the fourth wall in this new adventure.

One of my favorite moments was when Jaco the Galactic Patrolman commented on how he was confused with the timeline of events, which is a common confusion for fans of the original series. It was a funny and self-aware moment that added to the humor of the story.

The characters also continued to interact with their fictional world in clever ways, with Vegeta acknowledging that he was once a villain and that his sudden transition to a hero was a bit jarring. It was a great way to address a commonly criticized aspect of the original story.

The fourth wall-breaking moments were as funny as ever, with characters even breaking character to address the audience directly. It was a creative and entertaining way to play with the format of the story.

As always, Goku remained clueless about the meta elements of the story, which only added to the humor and charm of his character.

Overall, the RoF Saga was a fun and entertaining read with plenty of clever fourth wall-breaking moments. I'm excited to see what new challenges the next part of the story will bring and how the characters will continue to interact with their fictional world.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Universe 6 Tournament part 9

As I continued reading Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would interact with their fictional world in a new setting, the Universe 6 Tournament.

One of my favorite moments was when Champa, the God of Destruction from Universe 6, made a self-aware comment about how all Gods of Destruction have to be weird and quirky. It was a funny observation that acknowledged the trope of eccentric and bizarre characters in the series.

The characters continued to break the fourth wall in clever ways, with Vegeta acknowledging that he's always had a rival, even when it doesn't really make sense for him to have one in the context of the story. It was a great way to address the long-standing rivalry between him and Goku.

The fourth wall-breaking moments in this saga were particularly clever, with characters even acknowledging the differences between the original series and this version. It was a great way to engage with the fans and show that the creators of the story were in on the conversation too.

Of course, Goku's cluelessness remained a constant source of humor, as he struggled to understand the nuances of the tournament and the new characters he was facing.

Overall, the Universe 6 Tournament was another entertaining and enjoyable read with plenty of fourth wall-breaking moments. I'm excited to see what new adventures and meta-commentary the next part of the story will bring.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | Goku Black part 10

As I delved deeper into the Goku Black saga of Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would continue to break the fourth wall in this dark and mysterious adventure.

One of my favorite moments was when Zamasu, Goku Black's counterpart, questioned the logic of characters getting stronger after coming back from near-death experiences, pointing out how convenient it was for the story's sake. It was a clever and funny observation that even seasoned fans of the series can relate to.

The characters also addressed the complexity of the time travel plotline and how it can be difficult to follow. It was a smart way of acknowledging how convoluted things can get when it comes to time travel, and it made the story more interesting.

As always, Goku's innocence and cluelessness remained a source of humor, as he struggled to understand the motivations of the new villains he was facing.

The fourth wall-breaking moments were also on point, with characters, even Goku Black himself, acknowledging the strange logic of a character with an identical appearance and abilities to Goku.

Overall, the Goku Black saga was a great addition to the story, with plenty of clever meta-commentary and intelligent observations. I'm excited to see what new challenges and fourth wall-breaking moments the next part of the story will bring.
wattpad: dragon ball Broke The Fourth Wall, me react to all characters Broke The Fourth Wall. | ToP part 11

As I continued reading Dragon Ball Broke The Fourth Wall on Wattpad, I was excited to see how the characters would break the fourth wall in the ToP Saga.

One of my favorite moments was when the Tournament of Power was first announced and one of the characters joked about how it was probably just an excuse to have new characters fight. It was a hilarious nod to the fact that new characters are often introduced just to have fresh and exciting fights.

As always, the characters continued to be aware of their fictional world, with Vegeta commenting on how he's always been second to Goku and how it seems like he'll never surpass him. It was a great way to address the dynamic between the two characters and how it's been portrayed in the series.

The fourth wall-breaking moments in this saga were especially clever, with characters acknowledging the various fan theories and opinions about certain characters and events. It was entertaining to see how the creators of the story engaged with the fans and added to the overall conversation around Dragon Ball.

Of course, Goku's innocent and clueless nature remained a constant source of humor, as he struggled to understand the rules and consequences of the Tournament of Power.

Overall, the ToP Saga was a great addition to the story, with plenty of entertaining fourth wall-breaking moments. I'm excited to see what new adventures and meta-commentary the next part of the story will bring.
